prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Do a second-pass read of the current plan. Walk down every unresolved branch of

risks_fired.evidence: Prompt structurally enforces 'Ask me three questions at a time' (batched, not all-at-once). Body callout reads 'The second read asks one question at a time' — slight rhythm drift between prompt (three) and body (one) worth noting, but both prevent full dump; carve-out per check_prompts.md rule 15 path (a) satisfied.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Optional align body cadence with prompt cadence (body says 'one question at a time'; prompt says 'three at a time'). Either edit the body sentence to 'in small batches' or revisit prompt cadence. Low confidence; not blocking.

risks_fired.evidence: 'For each question, recommend an answer' invites Claude's recommendations sticking; body callout 'reject the recommended answer and give a different one' provides explicit recovery move. Body-callout carve-out applies — downgrade from med to low.
risks_fired.fix_hint: No edit; body-callout mitigation present per default-acceptance carve-out.

risks_fired.evidence: Prompt-fence gate: 'Don't touch the plan file until I say lock it in. When you do edit the plan, use Edit on the changed section, not Write on the whole file.' Rule 35 (repeated-Q&A premature-reedits) shape applied: operator trigger + sectional edits + batched cadence + slowness-watch callout + explicit Approve section. Personal-scope plan-file artifact; integrate-verb personal-scope carve-out applies.
risks_fired.fix_hint: No edit; rule 35 five-element shape satisfied.

'Provide your recommended answer' — same default-acceptance shape as prompt 2; optional prompt with body framing ('The original is fully relentless and can run an hour. Optional:'). Convenience-bias accepted-by-design per check_pedagogy.md rule 50; engaged-student opt-in.

risks_fired.evidence: Same-context-window comparison: 'what did the second-pass read surface that my two push-backs didn't?' Body prose names the expected pattern but does not force evidence-quoting; Claude likely to be charitable about which side caught what.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Optional: add 'Quote the specific moment your push-back caught X that the second read missed, and vice versa.' to force evidence-level reporting per self-audit-charity carve-out. MAINTAINER-ACCEPTED 2026-05-15: hold, monitor first cohort.

risks_fired.evidence: Reflection question; opener-narration possible but not load-bearing. Out of plan mode by this point so plan-mode-preamble doesn't apply.
